steps.title: Identify what information answers the goal
steps.content: The student wants to identify the publication year. The notes provide exactly one fact that directly answers this: “It was published in the year 1025 CE.”

steps.title: Match that information to the choices
steps.content: Choice D states the publication year, answering the student's goal. Choices A, B, and C use different information from the notes—the book's content, the author's background, or its historical use—but don't identify when it was published. That matches choice D — D is correct.
